creator: meyer.arne83@gmail.com
text:
/usr/ports/sysutils/xfsprogs/work/xfsprogs-2.9.4/io/fadvise.c:108: undefined reference to `posix_fadvise64'
gmake[1]: *** [xfs_io] Error 1
gmake: *** [default] Error 2
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/xfsprogs.

Fix: Just replace posix_fadvise64 with posix_fadvise. Should work, as off_t is already 64 bits if I'm not mistaken.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Build xfsprogs on a system that has posix_fadvise.
